title: STRBEFORE does not return language tag
description:
Query:
SELECT (STRBEFORE(?S, " string") AS ?B) WHERE
{
    BIND("test string"@en AS ?S)
}

Result:
test

But the correct result should be "test"@en
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, lang_string VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, lang_string) VALUES (1, 'example string' || '@en');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, lang_string) VALUES (2, 'test string' || '@fr');
SELECT SUBSTR(lang_string, 1, LENGTH(lang_string) - LENGTH(' string')) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT SUBSTR(lang_string, 1, LENGTH(lang_string) - LENGTH(' string')) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
